description: Update company's Referral program settings. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/referral/program. Required parameters: subdomain, cv_upload_enabled, referral_status_visible, rewards_visible, signup_domains_enabled, company_id. Optional parameters include form_settings, signup_domains.

params.name: form_settings
params.description: { “email”: required | optional | hidden, “phone”: required | optional | hidden, “social_links”: required | optional | hidden, “cv”: required | optional | hidden, “salutation”: required | optional | hidden, “title”: required | optional | hidden }

example_request:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json

Body:
{
"cv_upload_enabled": false,
"form_settings": {
"email": "required",
"phone": "hidden"
},
"referral_status_visible": true,
"rewards_visible": true,
"signup_domains": [
"test-signup-domain.com",
"-#$%^&"
],
"signup_domains_enabled": true,
"subdomain": "testsubdomain"
}
